title: poa micrantha
intro: Poa micrantha, also known as short poa or small meadow grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Asia, and North America, and is often found in alpine meadows and rocky outcrops. The medicinal properties of Poa micrantha have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Poa micrantha, such as infusions and decoctions, can be used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
